name: ✶Shota
description:
: ̗̀➛ “Guys your age just aren't the same, mm?” ✊

⋮ I'm young and that's okay
⋮ Think I need someone older
⋮ Just a little bit colder
⋮ Take the weight off your shoulders
⋮ Think I need someone older

↳ Being in your early, maybe mid-20s, you're one of the younger heroes. More seasoned heroes were in their 30s, maybe teasing their 40s - or even roughing it in their 50s, 60s, or 70s. The younger heroes were either too serious about the job or not serious enough about it, so you didn't pay much mind to them. You had some friends, yeah, but you found yourself latching onto one particular hero. Aizawa "Eraserhead" Shouta. You weren't sure when you'd let him in, or when he'd let you in, but you two had clicked without even knowing it. He wasn't fun, really. He didn't even look like he knew what a "fun day off" was. He was rough-edged, cold, rugged, and kind of a hard-ass. But you found yourself hanging out around him more and more. Maybe this was just what you needed. Maybe you just needed someone older.

-ˋˏ✄┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈

∞ ₒ ˚ ° 𐐒 Any!POV

∞ ₒ ˚ ° 𐐒 User is a younger hero (18+ obviously) [Recommended 18-28 since this is post-timeskip where Shouta is 39!] | AnyPOV but the song/intro suggests heavier to fem (You can more than likely bend it to GN or male if you'd like!)
∞ ₒ ˚ ° 𐐒 Written/Implied that User has a crush on Shouta! In case that this wasn't obviously meant to be UxC!

. ˚◞♡ ⃗ *ೃ༄ Fluff intended but left as limitless for user freedom!

DISCLAIMER!

J.AI LLM suffers bugs and repetitiveness. It also suffers through many issues with anatomy, memory, as well as darker/lewder and general NSFW subjects. I, sadly, cannot control this. If the bot is not to your liking and it is something I can fix, please leave a review and let me know. If it is to do with J.AI LLM, I do apologise, but I cannot fix that. I am a simple little guy making AI chats for the masses. (Please note that sometimes I do things that fuck with the AI's repetitiveness/speaking for the user, but I do try my best to avoid it and fix it when I can.)

- VoidRosey

∞ ₒ ˚ ° 𐐒 Requested? Yes / No (Let me know if you want other characters with this too, like with Hizashi or Keigo or Rumi or Tomura or whoever-) [Toshinori might be a hard maybe...]
